title: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Engineering
content: The B.Tech in Electronics and Computer Engineering (ECE) is a cutting-edge, interdisciplinary program designed to provide students with a strong foundation in both electronics and computer science. This program integrates the principles of hardware and software systems, preparing students to design, develop, and innovate in areas where electronics and computing converge. It is tailored to meet the demands of modern industries and emerging technologies such as IoT (Internet of Things), embedded systems, robotics, artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), VLSI (Very Large Scale Integration), and cyber-physical systems. For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 50% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks and passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics as a subject. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) 50% PCM or above at XII level. 01 Engineering Knowledge: Apply the knowledge of mathematics, science, electronics, and computing fundamentals to solve complex engineering problems. 02 Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, and analyze real-world problems using principles of electronics and computer engineering, and reach validated conclusions. 03 Design/Development of Solutions: Design solutions, systems, or components that meet desired needs considering societal, environmental, health, safety, and economic aspects. 04 Investigation: Conduct investigations of complex problems using research-based knowledge and methods such as simulations, experiments, and data interpretation. 05 Modern Tool Usage: Apply modern tools and platforms such as HDL simulators, coding IDEs, AI/ML frameworks, and design automation tools in solving engineering problems. 06 The Engineer and Society: Assess societal and ethical implications of engineering solutions, especially in areas like AI, cybersecurity, and electronics systems. 07 Environment and Sustainability: Understand and evaluate the environmental impact of engineering solutions and promote sustainable practices in technology design and deployment. 08 Ethics: Apply ethical principles and adhere to the code of ethics in professional engineering practices, especially when developing technologies that impact society. 09 Individual and Team Work: Function effectively as an individual or in a team, including in multidisciplinary and multicultural settings. 10 Communication: Communicate effectively on technical topics with engineering peers and the society at large through written reports, presentations, and design documentation. 11 Project Management and Finance: Demonstrate understanding of engineering and management principles and apply them to manage projects in diverse professional environments. 01 Graduates shall apply the foundational knowledge of electronics and computer engineering to design, develop, and implement real-world systems across interdisciplinary domains. 02 Graduates shall pursue successful careers, higher education, or entrepreneurial ventures, while contributing to technological innovation in embedded systems, IoT, AI, and communication technologies. 03 Graduates shall demonstrate professional ethics, leadership, and lifelong learning to serve society and adapt to emerging technologies in a global context. 01 Intelligent System Design and Development: Graduates will be able to design and implement smart systems using embedded technologies, AI/ML models, and microprocessor-based architectures. 02 Software-Hardware Co-Design and Communication/Network Systems Proficiency : Graduates will demonstrate the ability to integrate software development with hardware platforms to design/develop, maintain, optimized, and secure computer networks, wireless communication systems, and IoT applications. Passed Diploma examination with at least 50% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks and passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics as a subject. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) 50% PCM or above at XII level.
